directory.noAccess: You do not have directory access.
directory.name: Name
profile.notFound: Not found, or outside your site.
profile.notPermitted: You are not permitted to request this change.
profile.sodRefused: You cannot approve this change (separation of duties).
leave.title: Leave balance
liability.title: Leave liability
liability.restricted: Leave liability is restricted to pay-visibility roles.
kpi.moduleOff: The {{title}} module is switched off for this client — analytics is not enabled.
kpi.enablePointer: Enable the Analytics add-on in tenant configuration to switch this module on.
kpi.noPermission: You do not have access to {{title}}.
attendance.title: Clock in
attendance.queued: No connection — punch queued; it will record once when back online.
exact.title: Exact payroll upload
exact.rejected: File rejected — schema invalid{{details}}. Nothing was ingested.
alerts.title: Document expiry alerts
alerts.noAccess: You do not have access to document alerts.
alerts.noRunAccess: You do not have access to run the sweep.
support.title: Support
support.subject: subject
support.agentOnly: Only support can change ticket status.
policy.title: Policy
controls.title: Controls & Checker
controls.noAccess: You do not have access to the controls view.
tenant.title: Provision a tenant
tenant.name: Tenant name
tenant.reviewText: Provision <1>{{name}}</1>. The tenant's company ID is minted by the platform; config and sites are seeded FROM THE REGISTRY (no manual step).
tenant.rollbackNote: If anything fails mid-provision, the whole tenant rolls back — nothing is half-created.
tenant.isolated: The new tenant is isolated (RLS) — its data is invisible to every other tenant.
tenant.rolledBackText: The provision failed and was rolled back atomically — no tenant, config, or site was created.
tenant.notPermitted: You are not permitted to provision tenants.
disciplinary.title: Disciplinary action
disciplinary.failed: Could not issue the action (nothing was recorded).
auth.consoleSub: Use your work email, password and MFA code.
auth.pinSub: Enter your 6-digit PIN on this enrolled device.
auth.resetPwSub: We will email a reset link to your work address.
auth.resetPinSub: A permitted owner resets the PIN; all your sessions are signed out.
auth.empty: Fill in your details to continue.
auth.errCreds: Sign in failed. Check your details and try again.
auth.offConsole: Console sign in needs a connection. Reconnect and retry.
auth.offPin: Offline — you can still sign in on this enrolled device; it syncs when back online.
auth.termBody: This account is no longer active. Contact HR.
auth.unregBody: This device is not enrolled for sign in.
auth.okConsole: Signed in. Taking you to your workspace…
auth.okReset: Reset link sent. All active sessions were signed out.
auth.okPinReset: PIN reset. All sessions signed out.
auth.pickTenantSub: This account is enrolled for more than one company.
auth.pickEmpSub: Shared kiosk — pick who is signing in.
auth.leastPriv: You see only what your role permits.
auth.fieldSub: This device and your PIN — nothing else.
auth.fieldHelp: Forgotten PIN? Your site HR officer can reset it.
auth.errField: Sign-in failed. Check your PIN and try again, or see your site HR officer.
auth.offField: You are offline. Signing in needs a connection — clocking in still works offline once signed in.
auth.fieldDeviceEnrolNote: Your site HR officer enters this when the device is issued. After the first sign-in it is remembered.
auth.fieldDeviceInvalid: That device ID is not valid. Ask your site HR officer to re-enter it.
overview.title: Workforce Overview
overview.emptyB: Tenant provisioned. Import or onboard employees to populate the overview.
overview.errB: The workforce service didn’t respond. Nothing was changed.
overview.noPermT: Overview isn’t available for your role
overview.noPermB: Field employees use the ESS app home — this console landing is role-scoped (A2 · AUTH-06).
overview.scopeNote: The landing and its scope follow the signed-in role — site-scoped roles see only their sites (A2 · AUTH-06).
overview.execExport: Aggregate figures only — drill-down to individual pay or records is not available to this role
overview.execBanner: Executive read-only — organisation-wide summary. No approvals, no individual pay, bank or personal records.
overview.execNote: CEO / Executive view (LI-3 / LI-6): organisation-wide aggregates only — not site-scoped, no edit or approve, no individual pay/bank. Matches the backend, which omits pay for this role.
overview.R05: Retired code — duties held by SHEQ Manager (R06)
overview.R08: Retired code — merged into Finance Manager (R15)
overview.R09: Retired code — merged into Chief Financial Controller (R16)
overview.R10: Retired code — clinic duties held by HR Officer (R03)
employees.profileSub: Console · confidential fields by role (A3) · C5
employees.joinerSub: Console · onboard · number generated TMCL-<LOC>-<SEQ> · C6
employees.transferSub: Console · move site/role · number unchanged · C7 · MOV-01
employees.rehireSub: Console · returning employee keeps original number · MOV-02
employees.idcardSub: Console · permitted fields · print = light · C9 · PRT-01
employees.dirScope: Site-scoped — you see your assigned site only (EMP-02).
employees.dirScopeOrg: Org-wide view — all sites visible to your role (EMP-02).
employees.confAbsent: Confidential fields (pay, bank, medical, permits) are absent for your role — not masked, genuinely not returned (A3 · EMP-01).
employees.confShown: Pay & bank visible to your role (A3).
employees.joinNote: The number is generated from the location and the next sequence — it is never typed (JML-01).
employees.transferNote: A transfer moves site and role but the employee number never changes (MOV-01).
employees.matchedSub: A former employee record was found on the national ID / legacy number.
employees.priorNoNote: Retained on rehire — a new number is NOT minted (MOV-02)
employees.rehireNote: A returning employee keeps their original number and their history is re-linked — no duplicate record (MOV-02).
employees.idNote: Only permitted fields render on the card; confidential fields are never printed (PRT-01 · A3).
employees.emptyDirBody: No employees match your site scope and filters. Adjust the filter or check your assigned sites.
employees.emptyGenericBody: This view populates once a record is selected or created.
employees.successJoinSub: Number TMCL-MW-2231 generated and the record created. Statutory registration flagged to Finance.
employees.successTransferSub: Site and role updated; the employee number is unchanged.
employees.successRehireSub: Original number TMCL-MW-2210 retained and history re-linked. Status is now rehired.
employees.successGenericSub: The change was recorded and audited (UNI-06).
employees.errBody: The action could not be completed. Nothing changed. Try again.
employees.offNote: Offline — showing the last synced records. Edits are queued and apply on reconnect.
employees.noPermBody: Employee master data is limited to HR and line-management roles (R02–R07). Your role cannot view or edit these records.
kpi.consoleSub: Console · role-scoped · live from workforce data · C3
kpi.liveNote: Computed live from the workforce data — headcount, attendance, leave, disciplinary and training (slices 2–6).
kpi.naRule: A KPI missing an input shows Not available with the input named — never a guessed or zero figure (LIAB-03).
kpi.consistNote: On / Watch / Off counts match the cards shown; Not-available and Monitor are excluded from the counts.
kpi.emptyBody: No metrics are assigned to this view yet. Once a period and role set are configured, cards appear here.
kpi.successSub: Saved to the period and shared to the dashboard. Values are frozen at this snapshot.
kpi.errBody: The scorecard is unavailable for this period. No values are shown rather than guessed ones (LIAB-03). Retry when the data source is back.
kpi.noPermTitle: KPI console is for management roles
kpi.noPermBody: The console scorecard is scoped to management, HR and finance roles (A2/A3). Your metrics are on the mobile app under My KPIs.
kpi.offlineNote: Offline — showing the last computed snapshot. Live values recompute on reconnect.
kpi.naStateBody: Several KPIs cannot compute because a data input has not been supplied. Each names the missing input and shows Not available — never a guessed or zero value (LIAB-03). Available KPIs still compute and count normally.
kpi.foBody: This tenant does not have the KPI module enabled. The scorecard is switched off entirely — no metrics are computed and no cards are shown. This is different from having no KPIs assigned yet.
leave.applySub: ESS · balance, overlap & 14-day checks at submission · E4
leave.approveSub: Console · approve / reject with coverage check · C10
leave.liabilitySub: Console · outstanding days in money · C16
leave.basisNote: Balances in days on the 30-day basis (LR-2).
leave.sickCertRule: A medical certificate is required from day one (LR-7).
leave.chkBalanceOk: 10 of 19 days remaining after this request.
leave.chkOverlapOk: No approved or pending leave in this range.
leave.hohBody: A request over 14 continuous days can still proceed, but only via Head-of-HR approval (LR-5). It routes for that exception once any hard blocks above are cleared.
leave.emptyApplyBody: Pick a leave type and dates. Your balance, overlaps and the 14-day limit are checked before anything is sent.
leave.successApplySub: Sent to your approver. You will be notified of the decision in ESS.
leave.offApplyBody: You are offline. The application is stored on the device and submits on reconnect. Balance and overlap are re-checked server-side at submission — nothing is sent yet.
leave.errApplyBody: Over-balance and overlapping dates are hard blocks — fix them before submitting. Nothing is sent until every check passes.
leave.noEntBody: This rotation carries no annual leave entitlement (9/3 rotation, LR-1). Annual leave cannot be applied for. Sick leave and its rules still apply.
leave.selfBody: The approver is never the applicant and duties are segregated per the matrix (SOD-01). Your role has no approval right over this request.
leave.errApproveBody: The decision was not recorded. Nothing changed — the request is still pending. Try again.
leave.offApproveNote: Offline — your decision is queued and applies on reconnect. Balance and coverage are re-checked server-side. Nothing is committed yet.
leave.matrixNote: Approval matrix & SoD unchanged — the approver is never the applicant (SOD-01).
leave.emptyApproveBody: Leave requests awaiting your decision appear here.
leave.successApproveSub: The employee is notified and their balance is updated.
leave.covOkBody: 2 of 3 storekeepers remain on shift during this leave. Coverage holds.
leave.covWarnBody: Approving this leave drops Storekeeper coverage at Mwadui to 0 of 1 present on 11–19 Aug. This is a warning, not a hard block (LR-6). You may proceed by acknowledging the gap.
leave.ackBody: Approve despite the coverage gap. The override is recorded in the audit with your name and role (UNI-06).
leave.overrideAudited: Coverage override recorded · approver, role, before / after · UNI-06
leave.exBase: Leave-pay base = monthly remuneration excluding Rotation and Night Shift allowances and the variable overtimes (EX-2).
leave.naNote: A missing input shows as Not available with the input named — never a guessed or zero figure (LIAB-03).
leave.noPermBody: The leave-liability view is limited to Finance and senior HR (R07, R08, R09, R11) per A3. Your role cannot see liability figures.
leave.emptyLiabBody: Choose a date to compute outstanding leave liability across active staff.
leave.errLiabBody: The figure for this period is unavailable. No number is shown rather than a guessed one (LIAB-03).
leave.successLiabSub: Exported for the finance hand-off, active staff only.
leave.offLiabNote: Offline — showing the last computed figure. Live liability recomputes on reconnect.
disciplinary.sodSub: Issuer cannot be the approver or the subject
disciplinary.suspendedSub: Directory row + profile header · distinct from terminated
disciplinary.tSuspD: Record + letter; status flips to suspended
disciplinary.subject: Subject employee
disciplinary.drawnFor: Disciplinary register entry will be filed on this record
disciplinary.detailsPH: Describe the conduct, dates and prior steps…
disciplinary.detailsVal: Repeated unauthorised lateness on 12, 18 and 24 June 2026 after a verbal caution on 5 June.
disciplinary.resolveMid: is the line manager named in the notification and the audit entry.
disciplinary.sodOk: Three distinct people. The issuer is neither the approver nor the subject — the action may proceed.
disciplinary.sodClashSelf: The issuer and the subject resolve to the same person. You cannot issue disciplinary action against yourself.
disciplinary.off: Offline — this action is queued with an idempotency key and committed once on reconnect. Nothing is written yet.
disciplinary.errBody: The transaction was rolled back atomically. No register entry, notification, letter, activity, or audit was written. There is no partial state. Retry when ready.
disciplinary.forbidBody: Issuing disciplinary action is restricted to HR roles (R05, R06, R07, R11) and the subject’s line manager per A2. Your role has no disciplinary right.
disciplinary.selfBody: You are the employee this action targets. The subject can never issue or advance disciplinary action against themselves (SOD-01 / DISC-04).
disciplinary.emptyBody: Select a subject from the employee profile and choose Issue warning or Issue suspension to begin. Nothing is recorded until you confirm.
disciplinary.fanWarnSub: One confirm — six artifacts written in a single atomic transaction.
disciplinary.fanSuspSub: One confirm — status flipped and seven artifacts written atomically.
disciplinary.fRegisterD: Filed on Peter Komba’s employee record
disciplinary.fEssD: Peter Komba notified in the field app (EN + SW)
disciplinary.fConsoleD: Line manager Grace Ndaki + HR team notified
disciplinary.fFeedD: Added to the employee’s activity timeline
disciplinary.fStatusD: Lifecycle flip · treated as suspended app-wide until lifted · DISC-03
disciplinary.letterCo:
Taifa Mining Co.
HR / People Operations
disciplinary.letterPrint: Light theme · A4 · footer + ref WL-2026-0042
disciplinary.dirNote: Suspended row — amber, retained in directory, distinct from terminated (red, excluded).
disciplinary.profSuspBand: This employee is suspended. ESS access is blocked and they are treated as suspended across the app until the suspension is lifted.
exact.exactSub: Console · payroll hand-off · schema, reconciliation & control-totals · C18
exact.assetSub: Console · register, assign, return & custody · C22
exact.dropBody: Drop the Exact payroll file (.csv) to validate against the HR master. Records are matched on the existing staff number.
exact.loadingBody: Checking the schema and matching records on the existing staff number.
exact.schemaOkD: All columns and types match the agreed Exact mapping.
exact.schemaFailBody: The file does not match the agreed Exact mapping. Nothing is reconciled or published until it is fixed — this is the safety net.
exact.reconMatched: 1,071 of 1,077 matched on existing staff number
exact.reconUnknownD: 3 rows reference a staff number the HR master does not hold.
exact.reconMissingD: 2 active staff have no row in the payroll return.
exact.reconLeaverD: 1 leaver appears in the return and is excluded (LVR-02).
exact.reconNote: Unmatched records are held for review — they never post silently.
exact.ctotOkD: File totals equal the totals computed from the HR master.
exact.ctotFailBody: File totals do not equal the totals computed from the HR master. Publishing is blocked until they reconcile — this is the safety net.
exact.successExactSub: Posted to Exact and published back to ESS. Employees notified.
exact.pubAudit: Hand-off audited · actor, control totals, before/after · UNI-06
exact.partialTitle: Partial publish — GL posted, ESS push failed
exact.partialBody: Payroll posted to the General Ledger, but the payslip push to ESS did not complete. The two legs are tracked separately, so the leg that succeeded is never re-run.
exact.legEssFail: Failed — employees cannot see the June payslip yet
exact.noRepublish: The GL leg is already committed — a full re-publish would double-post. Retry only the failed ESS leg.
exact.partialAudit: Each leg is audited independently — the committed GL post is not re-run · UNI-06
exact.netDefn: Net Pay = Total Pay minus Total Deduction
exact.errExactBody: Could not reach Exact to post the run. Nothing was posted; the validated file is held. Retry when the connection is back.
exact.offExactBody: Exact is unreachable. The validated file is queued and posts on reconnect. Nothing is posted yet.
exact.noPermExactTitle: No access to the Exact hand-off
exact.noPermExactBody: The payroll integration is limited to senior HR, payroll, finance and IT (R07, R08, R09, R12). Your role cannot run the hand-off.
exact.aScope: Scope: register · assign · track · record-keeping only.
exact.aScopeNo: No depreciation, maintenance, procurement or QR tagging.
exact.clearanceBody: Peter Komba is a leaver with assets still on record. Clearance flags each item for return before exit — record only, no financial value tracked (AC-ASSET-05).
exact.emptyAssetBody: Register an asset to begin tracking custody. This module records assignment and returns — not value, maintenance or procurement.
exact.successAssetSub: Custody updated and recorded. The holder is notified.
exact.errAssetBody: The custody change was not recorded. Nothing changed. Try again.
exact.offAssetNote: Offline — assignment and returns are queued and recorded on reconnect.
exact.noPermAssetTitle: No access to the asset register
exact.noPermAssetBody: The asset module is limited to senior HR and IT (R07, R12; asset-owner to be confirmed). Your role cannot manage assets.
exact.paySecure: Delivered in-app only — printing a payslip is a confidentiality breach.
exact.emptyPayBody: Your payslip appears here once payroll is published for the period.
exact.successPaySub: Your June payslip is now available.
exact.offPayNote: Offline — showing your last published payslip.
exact.noPermPayBody: A payslip is confidential to its owner. You can only view your own payslip.
governance.controlsSub: Console · governance controls run pass/fail with offending records · C20
governance.alertsSub: Console · lead times, notified role, set / repeat / clear · DOC-01
governance.policySub: Read current version, acknowledge, re-acknowledge · E7
governance.runningBody: Running governance controls across the tenant…
governance.ctrlSodD: Issuer ≠ approver ≠ subject across every action
governance.ctrlGpsD: Punches missing a device location fix
governance.ctrlLeaverD: Active sessions or roles held by leavers
governance.ctrlChainD: Hash chain unbroken end to end
governance.allClearBody: Every control ran clean — 0 offending records across all checks.
governance.allClearNote: This is the audit evidence: each control is shown with the population it checked, so “all clear” is provable, not asserted. Retained and timestamped (UNI-06).
governance.ctrlNote: Each control lists its offending records; nothing is auto-fixed. AUD-03 · governance run is itself audited (UNI-06).
governance.alertNote: Alerts repeat on the lead schedule until the document is renewed or the alert is cleared. Clearing is audited (UNI-06).
governance.supportNote: Every state change notifies the raiser and is tracked to closure (SUP-01..04).
governance.tkDetail: My May payslip is not showing in the app.
governance.supportOwnNote: You see only tickets you raised (SUP-02). The full queue is limited to support agents (R12) and HR admins (R07, R11).
governance.supportOwnTicketNote: You are notified at every state change. Only support agents (R12) move a ticket through its lifecycle.
governance.polRead: Read the current version, then acknowledge to confirm you understand it.
governance.ackChk: I have read and understood this policy
governance.reackBanner: A new version (v3.0) was published. Your previous acknowledgement (v2.1) no longer covers it — re-acknowledge to stay compliant (POL-03).
governance.trackedNote: Outstanding tracking rolls up who has and has not acknowledged the current version (POL-04).
governance.noPermPublishBody: Publishing new policy versions and the organisation-wide outstanding tracker are limited to HR admins (R07, R11). You can read and acknowledge your own policies.
governance.emptyControlsBody: Run the governance controls to check segregation of duties, GPS evidence, leaver access and audit-chain integrity. Offending records are listed per control.
governance.emptyAlertsBody: Set the lead times and the notified role to start expiry alerts for contracts, permits, medicals and certifications.
governance.emptySupportBody: Raise a ticket and its lifecycle is tracked to closure, notifying you at every step.
governance.emptyPolicyBody: Policies you must read and acknowledge appear here.
governance.successControlsSub: Results recorded and the run audited. Offending records are queued for follow-up.
governance.successAlertSub: Lead times and notified role updated. Alerts repeat until cleared.
governance.successSupportSub: Logged and routed. You will be notified at every state change.
governance.successPolicySub: Your acknowledgement of v3.0 is recorded and time-stamped.
governance.errBody: The action could not be completed. Nothing changed. Try again.
governance.offControlsNote: Offline — showing the last control run. Re-run on reconnect.
governance.offAlertsNote: Offline — alert changes are queued and apply on reconnect.
governance.offSupportNote: Offline — the ticket is queued and submits on reconnect.
governance.offPolicyNote: Offline — your acknowledgement is queued and records on reconnect.
governance.noPermControlsBody: Governance controls are limited to Compliance and IT (R11, R12) — not general HR seniority. Head of HR (R07) cannot run or view controls.
governance.noPermAlertsBody: Expiry-alert configuration is limited to HR roles (R05, R06, R07, R11) and IT (R12).
tenant.wizardSub: Console · stand up a new tenant from registry config · C21
tenant.repeatNote: Everything is seeded from registry config — standing up a new client is configuration, not a project. No manual database step (TEN-01).
tenant.noManual: from registry config · no manual DB step
tenant.idNote: A fresh company_id isolates every row — RLS keys off it from the first seed (TEN-02).
tenant.matrixNote: A2/A3 alignment seeded — landings, approval matrix and confidential-field scoping.
tenant.leaveNote: Entitlement by rotation (LR-1), 30-day basis (LR-2), sick 63+63 + cert (LR-7), carry lapses 1 yr (LR-4).
tenant.docsNote: Expiry-alert defaults seeded — DA-1 lead times and DA-2 notified role.
tenant.kpiNote: Role-scoped sets and RAG targets from the HR-metrics workbook (registry v1.2).
tenant.statNote: Statutory rates and the pay divisor seeded from registry — no hand entry.
tenant.reviewNote: Review every seed. Provisioning commits them in a single transaction — all or nothing.
tenant.emptyBody: This step is populated from registry config when provisioning starts. Nothing is written until you confirm on the review step.
tenant.loadingBody: Minting the company_id and applying the registry configuration.
tenant.provisionedSub: The company_id is active and every seed committed in one transaction. The tenant is ready — no manual step was needed.
tenant.rollbackBody: A seed failed validation. The whole transaction was rolled back — no company_id, no roles, no config. There is no half-provisioned tenant. Fix and retry.
tenant.noPermBody: Tenant provisioning is limited to the Head of HR, project HR lead and IT administrator (R07, R11, R12).
tenant.offNote: Offline — provisioning needs a connection to mint the company_id and seed config. Nothing runs offline.
ess.clockedOffD: Tap to clock in for today’s shift
ess.homeEmptyB: Your shifts, payslips, documents and requests will show up here once your account is active.
ess.docsEmptyB: Payslips, your contract and certificates appear here as they are issued.
ess.nLeaveB: Your annual leave 10–14 Jul was approved by Grace Ndaki.
ess.nPayB: Your June 2026 payslip is available in My Documents.
ess.nPolicyB: Code of Conduct v3.0 needs your acknowledgement.
ess.nClockB: You have not clocked in for today’s day shift.
ess.notifsEmptyB: You have no new notifications. New items sync here automatically.
ess.idEmptyB: Your digital ID card is generated once your profile is complete and approved.
ess.idNote: Only permitted fields are shown. Confidential fields are never printed on the card (PRT-01 · A3).
ess.gateB: A few required details are missing. Complete them to unlock leave, payslips and clock-in.
ess.gateDoneB: All required details are in. Full self-service is now available.
ess.blSuspB: ESS access is paused while a disciplinary suspension is in effect. You cannot clock in or submit requests until it is lifted. Contact your line manager or HR.
ess.blTermB: This account has been deactivated following separation. Self-service is no longer available. Your final documents remain accessible to HR.
ess.errB: Something went wrong reaching the server. Your data is safe — try again.
ess.offT: Offline — showing your last synced data
ess.offB: You are offline. This is the copy saved on your device; new changes sync when you reconnect.
ess.noPermB: This item isn’t part of your self-service access. If you think that’s wrong, contact HR.
attendance.lowAccTitle: Location accuracy too low — cannot confirm boundary
attendance.lowAccBody: The device has a fix, but its accuracy is wider than the site's boundary tolerance — so it cannot confirm whether you are inside. You are not outside; the reading is just too coarse. Nothing is captured. Move to open sky and retry.
attendance.lowAccNote: A coarse fix is never auto-accepted or auto-rejected — the punch is held for a clearer reading, and the server makes the trust decision on sync. The ±100 m tolerance is a placeholder pending SS-3.
attendance.coarseCardNote: Fix acquired, but its error circle is wider than the boundary — indeterminate, not a rejection. Held for a better reading.
attendance.ssNote: The geofence radius is unresolved in the criteria register (SS-3). The field and the pass / fail rule are drawn against a placeholder boundary — the value is pending, not invented.
attendance.deviceOnlyNote: The device records the punch and shows an advisory pass / fail. The trust decision is the server re-validating the fix on sync — it is not made here.
attendance.emptyInBody: You have no rostered shift today, so clock-in is closed. Nothing is captured. A shift must be assigned before you can punch in.
attendance.emptyOutBody: There is no open punch to close. Clock in first — clock-out only captures against an open shift.
attendance.loadingBody: Getting a location fix and a timestamp on the device.
attendance.successInSub: Punch captured and recorded on the device.
attendance.successOutSub: Shift closed. Hours recorded against the roster.
attendance.errBody: The device could not get a location fix in time. Nothing was captured — your shift is unaffected. Try again when you have a clearer signal.
attendance.noPermBody: Attendance capture needs device location to check the site boundary. Turn location on for this app to clock in — nothing is captured until it is enabled.
attendance.noPermWhy: ATT-03 · geofence needs a device fix
attendance.offBody: You are offline. The punch is stored on the device with an idempotency key and syncs on reconnect. Nothing is posted to the server yet.
attendance.conflictInline: This punch clashed on sync and is waiting for a decision.
attendance.kioskSub: Shared device · staff without a smartphone
attendance.rosterHint: Pick a worker to capture their punch on this shared device.
attendance.assistNote: Assisted punch — the operator captures on behalf of the worker and is named in the audit entry (UNI-06).
attendance.queuedBanner: Offline — punches captured on this device, awaiting sync. Nothing is posted to the server yet.
attendance.syncingBanner: Reconnected — syncing captured punches. The server re-validates each geofence fix.
attendance.syncedBanner: All punches synced. The server re-validated the geofence and extended the audit chain.
attendance.syncErrBody: The server could not be reached. Punches stay queued on the device with their keys, so nothing is lost. Sync retries automatically on reconnect.
attendance.syncEmptyBody: Every captured punch has synced. New punches appear here while the device is offline.
attendance.largeBatchBody: A shared kiosk collected a full crew offline. 148 punches are queued as one batch and sync together on reconnect — each still keyed and re-validated individually.
attendance.dedupeNote: Deduplicated on the idempotency key — a retried sync commits each punch once.
attendance.conflictBody: This punch clashes with a record already on the server. Choose which version to keep. The decision is audited (UNI-06) and the server stays the source of truth.
attendance.conflictKind: Duplicate clock-in — two open punches with no clock-out between them.
attendance.resolveHint: Pick a resolution to continue the sync.
attendance.auditExt: Audit chain extended · actor, role, before / after · UNI-06
ess.blocked.title: Access blocked
ess.blocked.suspB: ESS access is paused while a disciplinary suspension is in effect. You cannot clock in or submit requests until it is lifted. Contact your line manager or HR.
ess.blocked.termB: This account has been deactivated following separation. Self-service is no longer available. Your final documents remain accessible to HR.
ess.blocked.contactHint: Ask your line manager or the HR office at your site.
ess.payslip.title: Payslip
ess.payslip.identity: Net Pay = Total Pay − Total Deduction. Verified at ingest against the official Exact export (net identity, all rows).
ess.payslip.emptyB: Your payslip appears here after payroll is published to self-service.
kiosk.title: Shared kiosk, pick who is signing in
kiosk.enrolB: Enter the kiosk device ID issued for this site. The device is enrolled to the site — each person is identified by their own PIN.
kiosk.err: Could not sign in. Check the PIN and try again.
kiosk.notIn: Not clocked in — clock in first.
kiosk.blockedSusp: This account is suspended. Contact HR.
kiosk.blockedTerm: This account is closed. Contact HR.
resets.title: Credential resets
resets.sub: Password + field PIN · owner-gated · rank lattice · P5
resets.searchPH: Search email, name or staff number
resets.okPw: Password reset. All their sessions were signed out.
resets.okPin: PIN reset. All device sessions were signed out.
resets.latticeNote: A reset may only target an account at or below your rank — the lattice is enforced server-side and every reset is audited.
resets.forbidden: Only permitted owner roles can reset credentials.
resets.failed: The reset was not recorded. Nothing changed.
